title: pilosella bauhini subsp. plicata
intro: Pilosella bauhini subsp. plicata, a lesser-known species within the Pilosella genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is known to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive problems, thanks to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. In herbal preparations, Pilosella bauhini subsp. plicata is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile plant in traditional medicine.
